checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context preserved through physical artifacts (UX_AUDIT_REPORT.md, CSS_REFACTOR_PLAN.md, UI_PATCH.md).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Every transition requires the preceding artifact. REFINE always routes through Wait-For-Human before CRITIC.

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' in UX_AUDIT_REPORT.md and 'tradeoffs_rejected' in CSS_REFACTOR_PLAN.md.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: max_retries: 3 in YAML frontmatter. Wait-For-Human is mandatory for all subjective design changes.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: Visual confirmation is mandatory via human inspection. No agent self-approval of subjective design.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Composite Personas
checks.notes: Clearly defined: Connoisseur (Scout), Design Director (Strategy), Artisan (Refine), Design Critic (Critic), Collaborator (HITL).

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Explicit tool requirements. HITL fallback is central to the design — mandatory for subjective work.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: No reliance on specific LLM features. Human visual inspection replaces LLM self-assessment.
